corrections.note: Final nu visible in body text.
Printed body has singular νουμηνία, not plural.

corrections.current:

corrections.correct:
Ἱερουσαλημ (in ℵ μη ι lit ras inter λ et

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct; marginal verse numbers in body are as printed, not line-number intrusions. Apparatus generally accurate with a few small misreadings.
